mapper.sql: pes.employee_id as pe_id, pes.name, pes.relationship, pes.company, pes.post, pes.tele, pes.in_factory_flag, pes.attribute1, pes.attribute2, pes.attribute3, pes.enabled_flag, pes.id, pes.create_time, pes.create_by, pes.update_time, pes.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.relationship as ${tAlias}_relationship, ${tAlias}.company as ${tAlias}_company, ${tAlias}.post as ${tAlias}_post, ${tAlias}.tele as ${tAlias}_tele, ${tAlias}.in_factory_flag as ${tAlias}_in_factory_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_socialrelations (employee_id, name, relationship, company, post, tele, in_factory_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inFactoryFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_socialrelations set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, relationship = #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, company = #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, post = #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tele = #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, in_factory_flag = #{inFactoryFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select pes.employee_id as pe_id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pes.company) > 0 then pes.company else null end as company, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pes.name) > 0 then pes.name else null end as name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pes.post) > 0 then pes.post else null end as post, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pes.relationship) > 0 then pes.relationship else null end as relationship, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pes.tele) > 0 then pes.tele else null end as tele from pm_employee_socialrelations pes join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pes.employee_id where pes.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and concat( pes.company,pes.name,pes.post,pes.relationship,pes.tele ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'
mapper.sql:
select
,
from pm_employee_socialrelations pes left join pm_employee_socialrelations_temp pest on pes.id = pest.header_id and pest.enabled_flag = 1 and pest.check_flag = 'D' and pest.instructions_flag = 'U'
